45:1:1.m: Ha Meem (special letters that begin this chapter)

45:2:1.m: the sending down (subject of this ayah)

45:4:1.m: and in (location in خَلْقِكُمْ - your creation)

45:4:6.m: a creature (with emphasis on continuous movement)

45:4:9.m: they are becoming/remaining certain (referring to people who reflect on Allah's signs)

45:5:3.m: and the daytime (possessed by/connected to what follows)

45:5:8.m: the sky (possessed by or following something)

45:5:11.m: and then he gave life (to الْأَرْضَ/the earth)

45:5:13.m: the earth (object being brought to life in فَأَحْيَا)

45:5:15.m: its death (referring to الْأَرْضَ - the earth)

45:5:18.m: signs, miracles (subject of this part of the verse)

ٌ: subject of this part of the verse

45:5:19.m: for a people (who use their minds)

45:5:20.m: they use reason (referring to those who reflect on Allah's signs)

45:6:1.m: that (feminine, pointing to something far away) (refers to ءَايٰتُ)

45:6:8.m: a speech/narrative (that comes after اللَّهِ وَءَايٰتِهِۦ)

45:8:4.m: it is being recited (verses of ءَايٰتِ ٱللَّهِ)

45:8:6.m: then (after hearing Allah's verses being recited to him)

45:8:8.m: arrogantly (describes how he persists in يُصِرُّ)

45:8:9.m: as if (he did not hear it)

45:8:11.m: he hears it (referring to ءَايٰتِ - verses)

45:8:12.m: so announce to him! (as a command)

45:10:3.m: Hell (as the subject of what comes after)

ُ: (as the subject of what comes after)

45:10:5.m: he makes sufficient (subject of this verb is Allah)

45:10:6.m: away from them/about them (object of يُغْنِى - 'will not avail')

45:10:11.m: that which (refers to what they earned)

45:11:8.m: a punishment (subject of لَهُمْ - they have)

45:12:3.m: he thoroughly made (the sea) serve (for your benefit)

45:12:6.m: so that it (the ship) may flow

45:12:7.m: the ship (subject of تَجْرِىَ - it sails)

45:12:10.m: and so that you all may seek (connected to لِتَجْرِىَ)

45:12:13.m: and so that you all may

45:12:14.m: you all thank (referring to multiple people being addressed in this ayah)

ونَ: (referring to multiple people being addressed in this ayah)

45:13:1.m: and He made (something) serve (connected to previous ayah)

45:13:7.m: in/within (referring to what is in ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ)

45:13:9.m: all together (describing how something was done)

45:13:14.m: surely there are signs (connected to يَتَفَكَّرُونَ)

45:14:2.m: for those who (who will يَغْفِرُوا forgive)

45:14:8.m: the days (object of يَجْزِىَ - to recompense)

45:14:10.m: so that he may reward (connected to يَغْفِرُوا - they should forgive)

45:14:11.m: a people (object of يَجْزِىَ - to recompense)

45:14:12.m: with what/because of what (connects to يَكْسِبُونَ - they earn)

45:15:4.m: then for his self (the benefit is for himself)

45:15:8.m: then (connecting فَعَلَيْهَا with إِلَىٰ رَبِّكُمْ تُرْجَعُونَ)

45:15:10.m: your (all of you) Lord (the subject of تُرْجَعُونَ)

45:15:11.m: you (all) are returned (to رَبِّكُمْ - your Lord)

45:16:4.m: Israel (proper name meaning 'one who struggles with God')

45:16:8.m: and we provided them with sustenance (referring to بَنِىٓ إِسْرٰٓءِيلَ)

45:16:13.m: the worlds/realms (referring to all creation) (object of على)

45:17:2.m: clear proofs/signs (object of وَءَاتَيْنٰهُم/We gave them)

45:17:19.m: on the day (when Allah will judge between them)

45:17:20.m: the resurrection (on the Day of Judgment)

45:17:22.m: they were (referring to the people who differed/disagreed)

45:17:23.m: in it (referring to what they differed about)

45:18:9.m: you (don't) follow (the desires of those who don't know)

45:19:3.m: they will make free from need (negated by لَن)

45:19:8.m: and indeed (connects to ٱلظَّالِمِينَ - the wrongdoers)

45:19:14.m: close protector/guardian (of الْمُتَّقِينَ - those who are mindful of Allah)

45:19:15.m: the people who protect themselves (from wrong) (object of وَلِىُّ - guardian)

45:21:10.m: and they did/performed (connected to ءَامَنُوا۟ - believed)

45:22:5.m: with/by the truth (describing how Allah created)

45:22:6.m: and so that she/it is compensated

45:22:8.m: a soul/self (with a small م below)

45:22:10.m: she gained (referring to نَفْسٍۭ which is feminine)

45:23:1.m: then have you seen/considered? (asking about مَنِ ٱتَّخَذَ - the one who takes)

45:23:6.m: and he made him go astray

45:23:8.m: upon, on, over (preposition connecting to سَمْعِهِۦ - his hearing)

45:23:10.m: and he sealed (connected to وَأَضَلَّهُ - and He led him astray)

45:23:17.m: a covering/veil (object being placed on بَصَرِهِۦ - his sight)

45:23:19.m: he guides him (object of who will guide him)

45:23:23.m: so will they not? (asks why they don't take heed, referring to تَذَكَّرُونَ)

45:24:5.m: our life (as the subject of هِىَ)

45:24:12.m: the time/fate (which they claim destroys us)

45:24:15.m: with/by that (referring to what was just mentioned)

45:25:15.m: you all were (past tense, masculine plural)

45:26:3.m: He (Allah) gives life to you all

45:26:5.m: he causes you all to die

45:26:10.m: the resurrection (connected to يَوْمِ - day of)

45:27:4.m: and the earth (connected to مُلْكُ/dominion in previous ayah)

45:27:5.m: and on the day (when تَقُومُ happens)

45:27:7.m: the Hour (as the subject of تَقُومُ - stands/occurs)

45:27:8.m: on that day (when the Hour is established)

45:27:10.m: the ones who make things false (subject of يَخْسَرُ)

45:28:3.m: a community/nation (being called in this ayah)

45:28:6.m: a community/nation (being described in كُلَّ أُمَّةٍ)

45:28:9.m: her book (referring to each nation's record of deeds)

45:28:11.m: you (all) are being given what is due

45:29:9.m: what (that which you used to do)

45:29:11.m: you all work/act/do (referring to the disbelievers being addressed)

45:30:6.m: so he makes them enter (into رَحْمَتِهِ)

45:31:3.m: they rejected/disbelieved (those who are mentioned in الَّذِينَ)

45:31:4.m: Then did not (questioning the past negation)

45:32:7.m: and the Hour (referring to Judgment Day)

45:32:11.m: you all said (in response to being told about Allah's promise and the Hour)

45:32:15.m: the Hour (subject of لَا رَيْبَ فِيهَا)

45:33:2.m: for them/to them (receiving what became apparent in بَدَا)

45:33:9.m: they were (referring to those who mocked)

45:33:10.m: with him/it (referring to what they used to mock)

هِۦ: him/it (referring to what they used to mock)

45:34:2.m: the day (object of قِيلَ/it was said)

45:34:4.m: just as (connects to نَسِيتُمْ - you forgot)

45:34:5.m: you all forgot (referring to the disbelievers being addressed in this ayah)

45:34:8.m: this (pointing to something in the ayah)

هٰذا: this (pointing to something in the ayah)

45:35:8.m: the life (worldly life in this ayah)

45:35:10.m: so today (object of what happens next in يُخْرَجُونَ)

45:35:12.m: they are made to exit/are expelled

45:35:16.m: they are asked to make amends

45:36:1.m: so/then for Allah (connected to الْحَمْدُ - praise)

45:36:6.m: of the earth (possessed by رَبِّ - Lord of)

45:37:7.m: The Mighty (as a name/attribute of Allah)
